description: Testing the display and functionality of predefined hotkeys across different screens.

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify the displaying of Hotkey label on corresponding menu/screens
[base on requirement]
expected_result:
Displays the same as design or specification about:
 - Label
 - Style

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify action of Hotkey on defined screens/functions
  - Press hotkey one time
[base on requirement]
expected_result:
Performs corresponding function of that Hotkey.
[base on requirement]

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify action of Hotkey on defined screens/functions
  - Press hotkey many times
[base on requirement]
expected_result: Should only perform corresponding action of that Hotkey one time.

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify action of Hotkey on other screens/functions that NOT defined
expected_result: No action.

description: Testing the addition of new hotkeys through input form including validation and duplicate checking.

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify place holder/default value of <item name> 
[base on requirement]
expected_result:
Displays the same as specification.
[base on requirement]

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify if input allowed key
[base on requirement]
expected_result:
Hotkey will be accepted. Hotkey label displayed on the corresponding menu/screens.
[base on requirement]

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify if input NOT allowed key.
 Example:- wrong format: only text, special key, number..
[base on requirement]
expected_result:
Show error message, hotkey will be not accepted.
[base on requirement]

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify if input duplicate allowed key
expected_result: Show error message, hotkey will be not accepted.

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify the action of Hotkey
 - When fucus on application
 - When NOT focus on application (lost focus or have alert, popup.. In case, form use Javascript and turn off JS)
expected_result:
Perform corresponding function of that Hotkey.
[base on requirement]

description: Testing the addition of new hotkeys through selection form including modifier combinations and validation.

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify the UI of modal
expected_result:
Displays the same as design or specification.
[base on requirement]

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify list of Modifiers for Hotkeys
[base on requirement]

Ex: Ctrl - Alt - Shift...
expected_result:
Displays list of Modifiers.
[base on requirement]

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify list of Keys will be used for Hotkeys
[base on requirement]

Ex: Alpabet characters A - B - C -...
      Or function keys F1 - F2 - F3 -...
expected_result:
Displays list of Keys.
[base on requirement]

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify User can add Hoykeys success by combining one Modifier item and one Key item
[base on requirement]
expected_result: Add Hotkey successfully.

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify User can add Hoykeys success by combining multiple Modifier items and one Key item
[base on requirement]
expected_result: Add Hotkeys successfully.

description: Testing the update functionality of existing hotkeys through input form including validation and error handling.

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify the UI of modal
expected_result:
Displays the same as design or specification.
[base on requirement]

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify if update new allowed key
[base on requirement]
expected_result:
Hotkey will be accepted. Hotkey label updated on the corresponding menu/screens.
[base on requirement]

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify if update NOT allowed key
[base on requirement]
expected_result:
Show error message, hotkey will be not accepted.
[base on requirement]

description: Testing the update functionality of existing hotkeys through selection form including modifier combinations.

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify User can update new Hotkeys success by combining one Modifier item and one Key item
[base on requirement]
expected_result: Update Hotkey successfully.

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify User can update Hoykeys success by combining multiple Modifier items and one Key item
[base on requirement]
expected_result: Update Hotkeys successfully.

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify User can update Hoykeys success by combining all Modifier items and one Key item
[base on requirement]
expected_result: Update Hotkeys successfully.

description: Testing the deletion of hotkeys through different methods and verifying the removal of functionality.

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify the Hotkey deleted by clearing data in [Hotkey] textbox
[base on requirement]
expected_result: Hotkey is deleted and No action occur when pressing it.

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify the Hotkey deleted by clicking on [Delete] button
[base on requirement]
expected_result: Hotkey is deleted and No action occur when pressing it.
